< Home >

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.InstantMessageMassMessageType

The mass message type of instant message threads. Should match with <see cref="T:Itsolutions.ItslUtils.Constants.InstantMessageMassMessageType" />

Possible enumeration values:

NameValueDescription
None

1

Common way to deliver message
OneWay

2

One way message (used when there is more than 300 recipients)
Broadcast

3

Broadcast message (created by admin to send to hierarchies)
